## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary of the change and the motivation. Link issues with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `./scripts/test.sh` passes
- [ ] UI-independent logic lives in `CliplexKit` and is covered by tests where practical
- [ ] No telemetry or network calls were introduced (Cliplex is local-only by design)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or commands changed
